findings.evidence: rg hit lines 62-65 show the docstring includes proof-specific implementation details.
findings.fix: Rewrite the docstring to state only that self-diffeomorphisms form a group under composition, with multiplication acting as `f ∘ g`.
findings.issue: `instGroup`'s docstring describes the proof method (`The proofs are the Diffeomorph composition lemmas...`) instead of only the result/object.

findings.evidence: rg hit lines 71-93 and 103 list these public theorem declarations without preceding `/-- ... -/` docstrings.
findings.fix: Add concise docstrings to the public main/API lemmas, or mark internal helper lemmas private if they are not intended as public API.
findings.issue: Public API lemmas `one_def`, `mul_def`, `inv_def`, `coe_one`, `coe_mul`, `mul_apply`, `one_apply`, `inv_apply`, `toEquiv_one`, `toEquiv_mul`, and `toPerm_injective` have no declaration docstrings, although the module doc advertises these as main results/companions.

summary: The new file has a useful module docstring and documents the main definitions, but several public lemmas advertised as main results are undocumented. One instance docstring also describes proof implementation details rather than just the mathematical object.
